title: Casino Floor Operator
subtitle: Casino Operations, Technical Troubleshooting, and Customer Support
bullets: Operated and monitored casino floor activities, providing direct customer support and ensuring optimal performance of gaming machines.

Diagnosed and resolved machine errors, performing technical inspections on internal components (CPU, bill validators, printers, and network systems) and coordinating with surveillance teams for operational verification.
Managed check-in/check-out processes, handled payouts and jackpots, and maintained accurate communication using internal operational codes.
Conducted opening and closing procedures, including machine meter verification, system status checks, and report generation for daily operations.
Ensured compliance with safety, operational, and customer service standards in a high-paced environment.

title: Developer Internship
subtitle: Automation, Integration, and Frontend Development
bullets: Automation using n8n with generative AI to generate reports and delivery of newsletters to staff.
Use of AI models to analyze and extract insights from documents and porting to JSON format.
Develop and maintain an avatar documentation system using React and TypeScript with a Laravel backend.

title: Teaching Assistant - Software Engineering
subtitle: Supporting Students in the Software Engineering Career
bullets: Assisted professors at in delivering coursework for Python Programming, Database Management Systems, and Theory of Computation.
Provided Python tutoring sessions to students, reinforcing core programming concepts and problem-solving skills.
Supported the development and grading of course assignments, ensuring clarity, correctness, and alignment with academic objectives.
Collaborated in the creation of educational materials for Web Development courses using JavaScript, Node.js, Express, HTML, CSS, and authentication methods like JWT, Cookies, and Sessions.
Contributed to study content for Cross-Platform Development using React Native and the Expo framework.
skills: Web Development (JavaScript, Node.js, Express, HTML, CSS)
